name: Tiessennau Mel (Honey Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sieve together flour, cinnamon and bicarbonate of soda.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Separate the egg yolk from the white.
4. Beat the egg yolk into the butter and sugar mixture.
5. Gradually add honey to the butter and sugar mixture.
6. Mix in the flour with a little milk as required, mixing lightly.
7. Whisk the egg white until stiff and fold into the mixture.
8. Fill small patty tins about halfway with the mixture.
9. Sprinkle caster sugar on top of each cake.
10. Bake in a hot oven at Gas mark 6 (400°F) or Gas mark 7 (425°F) for 20 minutes.
When ready, sprinkle additional sugar on top.
